results.title: GOAU ETF: Investors May Be Better Off Buying Royalty Companies Themselves (NYSEARCA:GOAU) | Seeking Alpha
excerpts:
Section Title: GOAU: Investors May Be Better Off Buying The Royalty Companies Themselves
Content:
Mar. 11, 2023 7:13 AM ET US Global GO GOLD and Precious Metal Miners ETF (GOAU) GDX
Macrotips Trading
6.09K Followers
Follow
5Share
Save
Comments (3)
Section Title: GOAU: Investors May Be Better Off Buying The Royalty Companies Themselves > Summary
Content:
GOAU provides exposure to precious metal producers and royalty companies.
The ETF's composition is heavily skewed towards royalty companies.
Royalty companies have historically outperformed due to lower business risks. However, GOAU's historical returns have only matched the producer-heavy GDX.
I think investors are better off buying a basket of royalty companies instead of holding GOAU.
Inok
The U.S. Global GO GOLD and Precious Metal Miners ETF ( [GOAU](https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GOAU "US Global GO GOLD and Precious Metal Miners ETF") ) provides exposure to precious metal companies that are selected and weighted using U.S. Global's proprietary composite scoring methodology. The GOAU is heavily skewed towards royalty and streaming companies.
This article was written by
Macrotips Trading
6.09K Followers
Follow
